text:
この前のマノンといい、
最近“星渡り”がよく降りてくるのね。
何だか町がにぎやかになってきたわ。

“エアリオタウン”は、食べ物が美味しいの。
魚や野菜、果物、どれもとっても新鮮で。

栄養も満点だから、
お肌がつるつるにな
There's been a bunch of Meteorn arriving lately, like Manon.
It's set a bit of a buzz about town.

There are a load of tasty dishes to sample in Aelio Town.
Fish, vegetables, fruit, it's all nice and fresh.
Everything's packed full of nutrients. Really works wonders for your skin.
